title: bryonia cretica subsp. cretica
intro: Bryonia cretica subsp. cretica is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Cucurbitaceae, native to the Mediterranean region. It is also known as Crete bryony, a plant rich in medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal disorders. The health benefits of Bryonia cretica subsp. cretica include its anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant properties, making it a popular herbal remedy for respiratory issues and digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Bryonia cretica subsp. cretica include tinctures, infusions, and ointments, often used to relieve pain, reduce inflammation, and promote relaxation.
